_patch_meta.session_ref: M10 Phase 3 follow-on: Pass A for Mic 2:10 cha.val (1 verse)
_patch_meta.source: Claude API meaning record (Sonnet 4.6); 1 verses across 1 terms

set.analysis_note: Uncleanness actively destroys the land's fitness as a resting place, making it unlivable — the destructive force is so severe it compels departure, showing sin's power to corrupt and expel from what should be a place of peace and belonging.
